title: JSON wrong class type, label correct (flash-glare, level 6, sideways)
image_prompt: Photorealistic tall cylindrical bottle with a crisp, modern silver label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Silver Crest', 'Vodka', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Silver Crest Spirits, Seattle, WA'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate flash glare over label text. Camera orientation is sideways (90 degrees). The photo is sideways and may need rotation before automated approval.
